subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at home of Corinne True in Chicago, 1912-11-01
subcodes.first_line: I am well pleased with every person here this evening and most happy in meeting the friends
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
